{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Oathsign
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]'s [[Oathsign]] technique is [[madra]]-efficient.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Oathsign]] is a technique used to [[Forge]] rings.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
